---
title: "Global Health Spending"
subtitle: "TidyTuesday -- PMAP 8551/4551, Spring 2026"
author: "Richmond Asare"
date: "04/21/2026"
date-format: "long"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
  typst: 
    toc: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
  docx:
    toc: true
---

# Data description and cleaning

```{r}
#| label: loading-data
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)

tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2026-04-21')
financing_schemes <- tuesdata$financing_schemes
health_spending <- tuesdata$health_spending
spending_purpose <- tuesdata$spending_purpose
```

# Out-of-pocket spending over time

```{r}
#| label: out-of-pocket-health-spending
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 7
#| fig-alt: "Out-of-pocket health spending as a share of current health expenditure for the 20 highest-burden countries, 2000-2023. Dashed line represents the 50% threshold."

# Loading the Lato font into your R session
if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
windowsFonts(`Lato` = windowsFont("Lato"))
}

# Top 20 highest-burden countries (OOP spending as share of health expenditure)
oop_top20<- financing_schemes |> 
  filter(
    financing_scheme == "Household out-of-pocket payments (OOPS)",
    unit == "% of current health expenditure"
  ) |> 
  group_by(country_name, iso3_code) |> 
  slice_max(year, n = 1) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  slice_max(value, n = 20)
  
oop_top20_plot<- financing_schemes |> 
  filter(
    financing_scheme == "Household out-of-pocket payments (OOPS)",
    unit == "% of current health expenditure",
    country_name %in% oop_top20$country_name
  ) |> 
  mutate(country_name = fct_reorder(country_name, -value, .fun = last)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y= value)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "#c0392b") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 50, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(vars(country_name), ncol = 5) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(2000, 2010, 2023)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "Out-of-Pocket Spending Over Time",
    subtitle = 
    "Out-of-pocket health spending as a share of current health expenditure for the 20 highest-burden countries, 2000-2023. Dashed line represents the 50% threshold.", 
    caption = "Source: WHO Global Health Expenditure Database (GHED)",
    x = NULL, y = "% of current health expenditure"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11, base_family = "Lato") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "italic"),
    plot.caption  = element_text(hjust = 0),
    strip.text = element_text(hjust = 0),
    axis.title.y = element_text(hjust = 1),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8)
  )
  
# Save the plot 
ggsave(
oop_top20_plot, filename = "out-of-pocket_plot.png",
width = 12, height = 7, units = "in", bg = "transparent"
)

oop_top20_plot
```
